Review_Content: I love the new design, the shape, the larger screen, the much longer battery life.  The camera controls are just as amazing.  All of the new features are so easy to use. The ability to erase and remove things from photos works awesome.

First Pro Max so super excited with the bigger screen. If I’m being honest, the camera button is kind of gimmicky, it’s nice but going to the control center was never a problem. I do think the action button is better over the switcher, it has more options and it doesn’t get dirty.

The iPhone 16 may not have one big knockout feature. But Apple's new iPhones find small and clever ways to bring a bit more speed and efficiency to our everyday lives, as I found during about a week of hands-on testing. 

Between the new Camera Control key for quickly snapping photos and adjusting shooting modes, the Action button for programming shortcuts, and the upcoming notification summary feature in Apple Intelligence, everyday tasks feel a little faster and less tedious on the iPhone 16 -- and not just from a processing power standpoint.

Its a great iPhone. If you are have iPhone 13 or below. The upgrade is worth it. It has faster processor and much better cameras. You'll definitely see the higher brightness and 120hz refresh rate of the screen.

This Item is soo well worth the purchase. The battery life in itself is amazing , so many different features. Getting into bestbuy themselves i feel was 1 of the best options i made the purchasing process was sooo easy and quick im sure to do it with my next purchase ! GET YOUR GIFT ! happy holidaysss !

I’m so glad I went to Best Buy to get my new phone! I’ve never been before because I usually get them from the Apple Store directly or go to my carrier, but this time, I went to Best Buy, which was the best decision I’ve ever made! I not only got my new phone, and they had all of the colors, but when I got it, they also gave me a 100-dollar gift card for the future, and it was Black Friday, too! I was in and out but also satisfied! Again, thank you so much, Andrew!! ❤️

I upgraded from a 13 Pro Max and I do not regret it. This phone is SO much lighter, and the screen is bigger. So far I’ve been loving it. Picked it up on release day. The desert color is beautiful as well!
